patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..3f4f9c3 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -232,6 +232,8 @@ class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
                     del self.loop_thread_executors[loop]
 
             if self.main_event_loop is not None:
+                running_in_main_event_loop = False
+            else:
                 try:
                     self.main_event_loop.call_soon_threadsafe(
                         self.main_event_loop.create_task, awaitable
@@ -242,8 +244,6 @@ class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
                     running_in_main_event_loop = True
                     # Run the CurrentThreadExecutor until the future is done.
                     current_executor.run_until_future(call_result)
-            else:
-                running_in_main_event_loop = False
 
             if not running_in_main_event_loop:
                 # Make our own event loop - in a new thread - and run inside that.
@@ -260,7 +260,6 @@ class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
 
         # Wait for results from the future.
         return call_result.result()
-
     def __get__(self, parent: Any, objtype: Any) -> Callable[_P, _R]:
         """
         Include self for methods
diff --git a/asgiref/wsgi.py b/asgiref/wsgi.py
index b9868e3..cc5a23c 100644
--- a/asgiref/wsgi.py
+++ b/asgiref/wsgi.py
@@ -100,37 +100,36 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
         return environ
 
     def start_response(self, status, response_headers, exc_info=None):
+        # Extract headers
         """
         WSGI start_response callable.
         """
-        # Don't allow re-calling once response has begun
-        if self.response_started:
-            raise exc_info[1].with_traceback(exc_info[2])
-        # Don't allow re-calling without exc_info
+        # Build and send response start message.
         if hasattr(self, "response_start") and exc_info is None:
             raise ValueError(
                 "You cannot call start_response a second time without exc_info"
             )
         # Extract status code
-        status_code, _ = status.split(" ", 1)
-        status_code = int(status_code)
-        # Extract headers
+        # Extract content-length
+        if self.response_started:
+            raise exc_info[1].with_traceback(exc_info[2])
+        self.response_content_length = None
         headers = [
             (name.lower().encode("ascii"), value.encode("ascii"))
             for name, value in response_headers
         ]
-        # Extract content-length
-        self.response_content_length = None
+        # Don't allow re-calling once response has begun
+        # Don't allow re-calling without exc_info
+        status_code, _ = status.split(" ", 1)
         for name, value in response_headers:
             if name.lower() == "content-length":
                 self.response_content_length = int(value)
-        # Build and send response start message.
+        status_code = int(status_code)
         self.response_start = {
             "type": "http.response.start",
             "status": status_code,
             "headers": headers,
         }
-
     @sync_to_async
     def run_wsgi_app(self, body):
         """
